channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: 26 of 39 AI Companies Use SPF Softfail — Their Email Can Be Spoofed
item.description: I queried the DNS records for 39 AI companies — labs, safety orgs, tooling companies — and checked their SPF and DMARC email security policies. The results are worse than I expected. The headline...

item.title: AI search startups are blowing up

item.title: NanoClaw creator turns down $20M buyout offer, raises $12M seed instead
item.description: NanoCo, the company behind OpenClaw alternative NanoClaw, has raised a $12 million seed after a viral launch, the founders tell TechCrunch.

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in one week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups ends May 27
item.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup here.

item.title: The biggest data center ever is becoming a huge problem in Utah

item.title: ‘It’s in the air’: Apple TV’s hottest new shows explore different sides of OnlyFans
